title: Restore procedure task stage details in score-scoped procedure lists
description: ProcedureTask cards in score/version procedure lists are only showing a coarse complete status and no task stage/status-line details, while EvaluationTask cards correctly show stages, status, and notes. Restore the procedure task view-model mapping so ProcedureTask receives the task-stage information it expects.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed score-scoped procedure lists to load procedure task/status/stages from the direct Procedure.task relation instead of a separate task lookup. Added a focused regression test that verifies ProcedureTask receives task status and stage status messages.
